name: blair-server
description: Blair AI coding assistant — Express server

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist/db/migrations && cp src/db/migrations/*.sql dist/db/migrations/
scripts.test: tsx --test src/config/index.test.ts src/routes/github.test.ts src/routes/repos.test.ts src/routes/jobs.test.ts src/routes/registry.test.ts src/routes/adapt.test.ts src/services/orchestrator/index.test.ts src/services/harvester/registry.test.ts src/services/harvester/tfrs-adapter.test.ts src/services/harvester/manifest-store.test.ts
